title: Cursed HorrorMeta
description: Cursed HorrorMeta (Minecraft Plugin) is a horror-themed gameplay plugin that transforms a normal Minecraft server into a tense, immersive nightmare.
body:
HorrorMeta (Minecraft Plugin) is a horror-themed gameplay plugin that transforms a normal Minecraft server into a tense, immersive nightmare.

Instead of the usual peaceful or adventurous experience, HorrorMeta introduces a constant feeling of unease. The world becomes darker, sounds feel distorted, and strange events start happening when players least expect them.

The plugin adds features like:

Dynamic Fear System: players build up a “fear level” the longer they stay in darkness or isolation. High fear causes hallucinations structure .. 
Cursed Structures
Sanity Events: fake players joining, distorted chat messages, or illusions of blocks changing to confuse and scare players.
Night Escalation: the longer the night lasts, the more aggressive and supernatural the world becomes.

HorrorMeta is not about jumpscares alone—it focuses on psychological horror. It makes players question what is real, encourages teamwork, and turns exploration into a risky, nerve-wracking experience.

Perfect for multiplayer servers, content creators, or anyone who wants to turn Minecraft into a slow, creeping horror story.
